name: ExtensionDeviceDefinition_RegulatoryIdentifier
title: R5: Regulatory identifier(s) associated with this device (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` has a context of DeviceDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DeviceDefinition`.
Element `DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Regulatory identifier(s) associated with this device (new)
element.comment:
Element `DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` has a context of DeviceDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DeviceDefinition`.
Element `DeviceDefinition.regulatoryIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This should not be used for regulatory authorization numbers which are to be captured elsewhere.
